summary: Iteration 49: Tested 'Sceneggiature Emergenti' (Emerging Screenplays) feature. All backend API endpoints working correctly (14/14 tests passed). Frontend EmergingScreenplays page and Dashboard integration verified with Playwright.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified the new 'Sceneggiature Emergenti' feature completely. All endpoints work: GET /api/emerging-screenplays (7 screenplays returned), GET /api/emerging-screenplays/count (total + new badge count), GET /api/emerging-screenplays/{id}, POST /api/emerging-screenplays/{id}/accept (both screenplay_only and full_package options), POST /api/emerging-screenplays/mark-seen. Fallback poster endpoint POST /api/ai/poster returns poster_url with Pillow-generated image when AI fails. FilmWizard correctly prefills data from accepted screenplay via React Router location.state.

emerging_screenplays_list.result: PASS - Returns 7 screenplays with correct structure

emerging_screenplays_count.result: PASS - Returns {total: N, new: N} for badge notification

emerging_screenplays_detail.result: PASS - Returns single screenplay, 404 for invalid ID

mark_seen.result: PASS - Clears notification badge (new count becomes 0)

fallback_poster.result: PASS - Returns poster_url with base64 data URL

frontend_dashboard_card.result: PASS - Card visible with emerald color, 'Sceneggiature' title, 'Trame pronte' subtitle

frontend_screenplays_page.result: PASS - Page loads with grid of screenplay cards

frontend_detail_dialog.result: PASS - Shows synopsis, ratings, screenwriter, cast, locations, equipment

filmwizard_prefill.result: PASS - location.state properly received, filmData prefilled

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/emerging-screenplays/{id} - 200 OK for valid, 404 for invalid
